requirement_topic.en: Unintentional Radiated & Conducted Emissions — FCC Part 15
requirement_topic.zh: 非故意辐射与传导发射限值 — FCC第15部分
requirement_topic.zht: 非故意輻射與傳導發射限值 — FCC第15部分

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters operating as digital devices must comply with FCC Part 15 Subpart B limits for unintentional radiators. Residential installations require Class B limits; commercial/industrial installations may qualify for Class A. Compliance is demonstrated via a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) supported by accredited test reports to ANSI C63.4 (radiated) and ANSI C63.4 or FCC-accepted methods (conducted). No FCC registration or pre-market approval is required, but the SDoC and test data must be retained and made available to the FCC on request.
summary.zh: 并网光伏逆变器作为数字设备须符合FCC第15部分B子部分的非故意辐射体限值。住宅安装须满足B类限值；商业/工业安装可适用A类限值。合规通过供应商合规声明（SDoC）证明，需辅以经认可的测试报告（辐射测试参照ANSI C63.4，传导测试参照FCC认可方法）。无需FCC注册或上市前审批，但SDoC及测试数据须留存并按要求提供给FCC。
summary.zht: 並網光伏逆變器作為數字設備須符合FCC第15部分B子部分的非故意輻射體限值。住宅安裝須滿足B類限值；商業/工業安裝可適用A類限值。合規通過供應商合規聲明（SDoC）證明，需輔以經認可的測試報告（輻射測試參照ANSI C63.4，傳導測試參照FCC認可方法）。無需FCC注冊或上市前審批，但SDoC及測試數據須留存並按要求提供給FCC。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR Part 15, Subpart B (FCC Rules — Unintentional Radiators)
ANSI C63.4 (measurement methods for radiated/conducted emissions)
FCC KDB 784748 (SDoC guidance)

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers typically hold CE EMC test reports to EN 55032 (emissions) and EN 61000-3-2/3-3 (harmonics/flicker), plus GB/T 17799 series test reports. Some also test to GB 4343.1 (household/similar appliance emissions). These EN/GB test reports are NOT directly accepted by the FCC — US requires FCC-framework test reports (ANSI C63.4) performed by an FCC-recognized accredited lab (A2LA, NVLAP, or equivalent). [UNVERIFIED: exact lab accreditation body requirements for PV inverter SDoC; verify against FCC KDB publications]
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常持有欧CE EMC测试报告（EN 55032发射、EN 61000-3-2/3-3谐波/闪烁），以及GB/T 17799系列测试报告，部分企业还按GB 4343.1测试。上述EN/GB测试报告不被FCC直接接受 — 美国要求按FCC框架（ANSI C63.4）在FCC认可的认可实验室（A2LA、NVLAP或同等机构）出具的测试报告。[未经核实：针对光伏逆变器SDoC的实验室认证机构具体要求，请核查FCC KDB相关文件]
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常持有歐CE EMC測試報告（EN 55032發射、EN 61000-3-2/3-3諧波/閃爍），以及GB/T 17799系列測試報告，部分企業還按GB 4343.1測試。上述EN/GB測試報告不被FCC直接接受 — 美國要求按FCC框架（ANSI C63.4）在FCC認可的認可實驗室（A2LA、NVLAP或同等機構）出具的測試報告。[未經核實：針對光伏逆變器SDoC的實驗室認證機構具體要求，請核查FCC KDB相關文件]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799.4 (EMC — generic emission standard, industrial environment)
GB/T 17799.3 (EMC — generic emission standard, residential/light industrial)
EN 55032 / CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment emissions — commonly used in CE scope)
GB 4343.1 (household/similar appliance EMC emissions) [UNVERIFIED applicability to grid-tied inverters]

gap.en: Core gap: FCC Part 15 requires US-specific SDoC documentation and test reports conducted under ANSI C63.4 at an FCC-recognized lab. CE EMC reports and GB test data cannot be substituted. Class A vs. Class B classification must be determined per FCC rules (not EN 55032 category), which may require re-classification and re-testing. The SDoC label, user manual FCC notice, and responsible party (US contact) requirements are unique to FCC and have no direct analog in CN certification. [UNVERIFIED: whether FCC has issued any mutual recognition or test data reciprocity arrangements for PV inverters with any CN lab]
gap.zh: 核心差距：FCC第15部分要求专门的SDoC文件及按ANSI C63.4在FCC认可实验室完成的测试报告，CE EMC报告与GB测试数据不可替代。A类与B类分类须按FCC规则（而非EN 55032分类）重新判定，可能需要重新分类和测试。SDoC标签、用户手册FCC声明及责任方（美国联系人）要求为FCC特有，在中国认证体系中无直接对应项。[未经核实：FCC是否就光伏逆变器与任何中国实验室建立互认或测试数据互认安排]
gap.zht: 核心差距：FCC第15部分要求專門的SDoC文件及按ANSI C63.4在FCC認可實驗室完成的測試報告，CE EMC報告與GB測試數據不可替代。A類與B類分類須按FCC規則（而非EN 55032分類）重新判定，可能需要重新分類和測試。SDoC標籤、用戶手冊FCC聲明及責任方（美國聯繫人）要求為FCC特有，在中國認證體系中無直接對應項。[未經核實：FCC是否就光伏逆變器與任何中國實驗室建立互認或測試數據互認安排]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — FCC Part 15 Subpart B applies to all digital devices marketed or imported into the US, including grid-tied PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as export requirement; CN manufacturers certified under GB/T 17799 for domestic market only

source.publisher: FCC / US Government Publishing Office (eCFR Title 47)

compliance_verdict.en: Gap requires action: Chinese PV inverter manufacturers must obtain new FCC-framework EMC test reports (ANSI C63.4) from an FCC-recognized accredited laboratory and prepare a US-format SDoC with a US responsible party. Existing CE or GB EMC reports are not substitutable. This is a mandatory pre-market requirement for US import/sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距，需采取行动：中国光伏逆变器制造商须在FCC认可的认可实验室获取新的FCC框架EMC测试报告（ANSI C63.4），并准备含美国责任方信息的美式SDoC文件。现有CE或GB EMC报告不可替代。这是美国进口/销售的强制性上市前要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距，需採取行動：中國光伏逆變器製造商須在FCC認可的認可實驗室獲取新的FCC框架EMC測試報告（ANSI C63.4），並準備含美國責任方資訊的美式SDoC文件。現有CE或GB EMC報告不可替代。這是美國進口/銷售的強制性上市前要求。

requirement_topic.en: Industrial, Scientific & Medical (ISM) Equipment — FCC Part 18
requirement_topic.zh: 工业、科学和医疗（ISM）设备 — FCC第18部分
requirement_topic.zht: 工業、科學和醫療（ISM）設備 — FCC第18部分

summary.en: FCC Part 18 applies to ISM equipment that intentionally generates and uses RF energy for industrial, scientific, medical, domestic or similar purposes (other than communications). PV inverters with switching frequencies or harmonics falling within ISM frequency bands (e.g., 6.78 MHz, 13.56 MHz, 27.12 MHz, 40.68 MHz) may be subject to Part 18 conducted and radiated emission limits in addition to Part 15. Part 18 sets field-strength limits at specified distances. Compliance path: verification by manufacturer; no FCC registration required for most Part 18 devices. [UNVERIFIED: whether grid-tied PV inverters are routinely classified under Part 18 vs. Part 15 only — inverter switching frequencies are typically 16–200 kHz, potentially below ISM band thresholds; confirm with FCC counsel or accredited lab]
summary.zh: FCC第18部分适用于故意产生并使用射频能量用于工业、科学、医疗、家用或类似目的（通信除外）的ISM设备。开关频率或谐波落入ISM频段（如6.78 MHz、13.56 MHz、27.12 MHz、40.68 MHz）的光伏逆变器，除须符合第15部分外，还可能须遵守第18部分的传导和辐射发射限值。第18部分规定了指定距离处的场强限值。合规路径：制造商自行验证；大多数第18部分设备无需FCC注册。[未经核实：并网光伏逆变器是否通常被归类于第18部分而非仅第15部分——逆变器开关频率通常为16–200 kHz，可能低于ISM频段门槛；请向FCC律师或认可实验室确认]
summary.zht: FCC第18部分適用於故意產生並使用射頻能量用於工業、科學、醫療、家用或類似目的（通訊除外）的ISM設備。開關頻率或諧波落入ISM頻段（如6.78 MHz、13.56 MHz、27.12 MHz、40.68 MHz）的光伏逆變器，除須符合第15部分外，還可能須遵守第18部分的傳導和輻射發射限值。第18部分規定了指定距離處的場強限值。合規路徑：製造商自行驗證；大多數第18部分設備無需FCC注冊。[未經核實：並網光伏逆變器是否通常被歸類於第18部分而非僅第15部分——逆變器開關頻率通常為16–200 kHz，可能低於ISM頻段門檻；請向FCC律師或認可實驗室確認]

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR Part 18 (FCC Rules — Industrial, Scientific, and Medical Equipment)
47 CFR Part 18, Subpart D (emission limits)
47 CFR §18.107 (relationship to Part 15)

summary.en: CN manufacturers typically address ISM-band emissions through GB/T 17799.4 (generic industrial EMC emissions) and, where applicable, GB 4343 series for household/similar appliances. There is no direct CN ISM equipment regulatory category equivalent to FCC Part 18. CE-based compliance may reference EN 55011 (ISM equipment emissions), but this standard and its test reports are not accepted by the FCC. [UNVERIFIED: whether SAMR or MIIT have issued specific ISM equipment EMC standards that map to FCC Part 18 scope]
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常通过GB/T 17799.4（工业环境通用EMC发射）以及适用时的GB 4343系列（家用及类似设备）来应对ISM频段发射问题。中国无与FCC第18部分直接对应的ISM设备监管类别。CE合规可能引用EN 55011（ISM设备发射），但该标准及其测试报告不被FCC接受。[未经核实：市监总局或工信部是否已发布对应FCC第18部分范围的专项ISM设备EMC标准]
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常通過GB/T 17799.4（工業環境通用EMC發射）以及適用時的GB 4343系列（家用及類似設備）來應對ISM頻段發射問題。中國無與FCC第18部分直接對應的ISM設備監管類別。CE合規可能引用EN 55011（ISM設備發射），但該標準及其測試報告不被FCC接受。[未經核實：市監總局或工信部是否已發佈對應FCC第18部分範圍的專項ISM設備EMC標準]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799.4 (EMC — generic emission, industrial environment)
EN 55011 / CISPR 11 (ISM equipment emissions — used in CE scope, not FCC-accepted)
GB 4343.1 (household/similar appliance EMC) [UNVERIFIED applicability]

gap.en: Applicability gap: Whether a specific PV inverter model falls under Part 18 (in addition to Part 15) depends on its switching frequency and harmonic spectrum — this must be determined on a model-by-model basis with an FCC-recognized lab. If Part 18 applies, CN manufacturers have no existing equivalent certification pathway; a new US-specific emissions test and manufacturer verification record is required. CE ISM reports (EN 55011) are not substitutable. [UNVERIFIED: typical switching frequency range of mainstream CN grid-tied inverters vs. ISM band thresholds]
gap.zh: 适用性差距：特定光伏逆变器型号是否须额外遵守第18部分（在第15部分之外），取决于其开关频率和谐波频谱，须由FCC认可实验室逐型号判定。若第18部分适用，中国制造商现无等效认证路径，须进行新的美国专项发射测试并保存制造商验证记录。CE ISM报告（EN 55011）不可替代。[未经核实：主流中国并网逆变器的典型开关频率范围与ISM频段门槛的对比]
gap.zht: 適用性差距：特定光伏逆變器型號是否須額外遵守第18部分（在第15部分之外），取決於其開關頻率和諧波頻譜，須由FCC認可實驗室逐型號判定。若第18部分適用，中國製造商現無等效認證路徑，須進行新的美國專項發射測試並保存製造商驗證記錄。CE ISM報告（EN 55011）不可替代。[未經核實：主流中國並網逆變器的典型開關頻率範圍與ISM頻段門檻的對比]

mandatory_status.target: Conditionally mandatory — applies only if the inverter's operating frequency or significant harmonics fall within designated ISM bands; must be assessed per model
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent mandatory requirement for export; domestic compliance via GB/T 17799 series

source.publisher: FCC / US Government Publishing Office (eCFR Title 47)

compliance_verdict.en: Conditional gap: Manufacturers must confirm with an FCC-recognized lab whether Part 18 applies to their specific inverter model based on switching frequency and harmonic profile. If applicable, new US-specific testing and a manufacturer verification record are required; existing CN/CE ISM test data cannot be reused.
compliance_verdict.zh: 条件性差距：制造商须与FCC认可实验室确认第18部分是否适用于其特定逆变器型号（依据开关频率和谐波特性）。若适用，须进行新的美国专项测试并保存制造商验证记录；现有中国/CE ISM测试数据不可复用。
compliance_verdict.zht: 條件性差距：製造商須與FCC認可實驗室確認第18部分是否適用於其特定逆變器型號（依據開關頻率和諧波特性）。若適用，須進行新的美國專項測試並保存製造商驗證記錄；現有中國/CE ISM測試數據不可復用。

requirement_topic.en: FCC Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) — Documentation & Labeling
requirement_topic.zh: FCC供应商合规声明（SDoC）— 文件与标签要求
requirement_topic.zht: FCC供應商合規聲明（SDoC）— 文件與標籤要求

summary.en: Devices subject to FCC Part 15 Subpart B (and Part 18 where applicable) must be accompanied by a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC). The SDoC must: (1) identify the responsible party (must be located in the US or have a designated US agent); (2) reference the applicable FCC rules; (3) be supported by test records retained for 2 years after the last date of manufacture. The device must bear an FCC compliance label or, for small devices, include the FCC ID statement in the user manual or on-screen display. The user manual must include FCC Part 15 interference notice language. No FCC filing or pre-approval is required for SDoC devices. [UNVERIFIED: specific SDoC label format requirements for inverters with remote/app-based interfaces — confirm against FCC KDB 784748 and 47 CFR §15.19]
summary.zh: 须遵守FCC第15部分B子部分（及适用时第18部分）的设备须附有供应商合规声明（SDoC）。SDoC须：（1）注明责任方（须位于美国或指定美国代理人）；（2）引用适用的FCC规则；（3）由保存至最后生产日期后2年的测试记录支持。设备须标注FCC合规标签，小型设备可在用户手册或屏幕显示中包含FCC ID声明。用户手册须包含FCC第15部分干扰声明语言。SDoC设备无需向FCC提交备案或获得预先批准。[未经核实：具有远程/App界面的逆变器的SDoC标签格式具体要求——请核查FCC KDB 784748及47 CFR §15.19]
summary.zht: 須遵守FCC第15部分B子部分（及適用時第18部分）的設備須附有供應商合規聲明（SDoC）。SDoC須：（1）注明責任方（須位於美國或指定美國代理人）；（2）引用適用的FCC規則；（3）由保存至最後生產日期後2年的測試記錄支持。設備須標注FCC合規標籤，小型設備可在用戶手冊或屏幕顯示中包含FCC ID聲明。用戶手冊須包含FCC第15部分干擾聲明語言。SDoC設備無需向FCC提交備案或獲得預先批准。[未經核實：具有遠程/App界面的逆變器的SDoC標籤格式具體要求——請核查FCC KDB 784748及47 CFR §15.19]

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR §15.19 (labeling requirements)
47 CFR §15.105 (information to user)
47 CFR §2.1077 (SDoC content requirements)
47 CFR §2.1074 (responsible party for SDoC)
FCC KDB Publication 784748 (SDoC guidance document) [UNVERIFIED: current publication number — verify on FCC KDB portal]

summary.en: CN manufacturers exporting under CE marking issue a EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) referencing EN standards, with CE mark affixed to the product. For domestic China market, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) or SRRC (radio) certificates are issued by designated certification bodies; manufacturers do not self-declare in the same way. The CE DoC format, responsible party structure, and label requirements are materially different from FCC SDoC — no direct reuse is possible. There is no CN domestic equivalent to the FCC 'responsible party in the US' requirement.
summary.zh: 中国制造商以CE标志出口时，须签发引用EN标准的欧盟符合性声明（DoC），并在产品上加贴CE标志。中国国内市场则由指定认证机构颁发CCC（强制性产品认证）或SRRC（无线电）证书，制造商不以同等方式自我声明。CE DoC格式、责任方结构及标签要求与FCC SDoC存在实质性差异，不可直接复用。中国国内认证体系中无对应FCC「美国境内责任方」的要求。
summary.zht: 中國製造商以CE標誌出口時，須簽發引用EN標準的歐盟符合性聲明（DoC），並在產品上加貼CE標誌。中國國內市場則由指定認證機構頒發CCC（強制性產品認證）或SRRC（無線電）證書，製造商不以同等方式自我聲明。CE DoC格式、責任方結構及標籤要求與FCC SDoC存在實質性差異，不可直接復用。中國國內認證體系中無對應FCC「美國境內責任方」的要求。

standards_or_laws: EU Declaration of Conformity (CE marking — EU framework, not FCC-accepted)
GB/T 30250 (product EMC marking) [UNVERIFIED applicability]
CCC certification scheme (CNCA — compulsory, domestic China only)

gap.en: Documentation gap: The FCC SDoC is a US-specific self-declaration with unique format, content, responsible-party, and labeling requirements. CN manufacturers must: (a) appoint a US responsible party (importer, US subsidiary, or authorized representative); (b) create a US-format SDoC referencing 47 CFR Part 15; (c) update product labels and user manuals with FCC-specific language; (d) retain test records for 2 years. No element of the CE DoC, CCC certificate, or GB test report fulfills these requirements. This is an administrative gap that adds time and cost independent of the underlying EMC test results.
gap.zh: 文件差距：FCC SDoC是具有独特格式、内容、责任方及标签要求的美国专项自我声明。中国制造商须：（a）指定美国责任方（进口商、美国子公司或授权代表）；（b）按47 CFR第15部分格式创建美式SDoC；（c）更新产品标签和用户手册，加入FCC专项语言；（d）保存测试记录2年。CE DoC、CCC证书或GB测试报告中的任何内容均不能满足上述要求。这是一项独立于EMC测试结果的行政性差距，将增加时间和成本。
gap.zht: 文件差距：FCC SDoC是具有獨特格式、內容、責任方及標籤要求的美國專項自我聲明。中國製造商須：（a）指定美國責任方（進口商、美國子公司或授權代表）；（b）按47 CFR第15部分格式創建美式SDoC；（c）更新產品標籤和用戶手冊，加入FCC專項語言；（d）保存測試記錄2年。CE DoC、CCC證書或GB測試報告中的任何內容均不能滿足上述要求。這是一項獨立於EMC測試結果的行政性差距，將增加時間和成本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SDoC with US responsible party, compliant labeling, and user manual FCC notice are all required before US import/sale
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — CE DoC and CCC are domestic/EU market requirements; no CN export requirement for FCC SDoC

source.publisher: FCC / US Government Publishing Office (eCFR Title 47, Part 2 Subpart J — Equipment Authorization)

compliance_verdict.en: Gap requires action: CN manufacturers must create a new FCC SDoC, appoint a US responsible party, and update product labeling and user manuals before US market entry. This is a mandatory administrative requirement independent of EMC test results; no existing CN or CE documentation satisfies it.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距，需采取行动：中国制造商在进入美国市场前须创建新的FCC SDoC、指定美国责任方，并更新产品标签和用户手册。这是独立于EMC测试结果的强制性行政要求，现有中国或CE文件均不满足该要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距，需採取行動：中國製造商在進入美國市場前須創建新的FCC SDoC、指定美國責任方，並更新產品標籤和用戶手冊。這是獨立於EMC測試結果的強制性行政要求，現有中國或CE文件均不滿足該要求。
